main_title: 3 Chilling Stories of People Who Found Strange Messages on Their Social Media Accounts

stories.seed: I thought I'd finally blocked my ex from all my social media accounts, but then I started receiving strange, cryptic messages on Facebook from a profile that looked exactly like mine. At first, I thought it was just a prank, but as the messages continued, I realized that whoever was behind the account knew my daily routine and was watching me from the parking garage at my office building.
stories.summary: A woman receives disturbing messages from a doppelganger social media profile that seems to be run by her ex-boyfriend, who is stalking her at work.

stories.seed: I started noticing strange, flirtatious comments on my Instagram posts from a guy who claimed to be my regular food delivery driver, and at first, I thought it was just harmless and maybe even kind of flattering. But when I started receiving packages at my home with no return address and no indication of who sent them, I realized that this delivery guy had been inside my apartment building and was leaving me gifts, watching me through the security cameras in the lobby.
stories.summary: A man becomes uncomfortable when his food delivery driver starts leaving him strange gifts and messages on social media, blurring the lines between customer and stalker.

stories.seed: I was driving home from a road trip when I noticed that my Twitter account was blowing up with strange, threatening messages from an unknown number, and as I scrolled through them, I realized that whoever was behind the account knew my exact location and was tracking my movements on the highway. As I pulled over at a rest stop to investigate, I saw a truck parked next to me with a custom license plate that matched the handle of the Twitter account, and I knew I had to get out of there fast.
stories.summary: A driver's social media account is hacked by someone who is tracking their location and movements on the highway, leading to a desperate bid to escape and uncover the identity of the stalker.
